message:
test(fcp-core): pin DegradedModeReason Display+serde divergence + DegradedModeState shape (flywheel_connectors-wik35)

Bead asks for SelectorMode variants Display + serde tag pinning. No
type literally named SelectorMode exists in fcp-core; the closest "Mode"
enum NOT yet pinned is DegradedModeReason at quorum.rs:452. Existing
pinned Mode enums: ApprovalMode, TransportMode, PcsMode +
KeyManagementMode, ConnectorStateModel.

Critical sentinel: DegradedModeReason has NO rename_all annotation.
Display via as_str() returns snake_case ("network_partition") but serde
defaults to PascalCase ("NetworkPartition") for every variant — they
DIVERGE deliberately. Operator dashboards filter on Display tokens;
wire payloads use the serde form. Pin the divergence so accidentally
adding rename_all = "snake_case" (silently merging two streams) is
caught at the integration boundary.

Coverage: 5-variant snake_case Display matrix, 5-variant DEFAULT
PascalCase serde matrix, loud Display ≠ serde divergence sentinel
per variant, snake_case-input-rejection sentinel (Display tokens MUST
NOT decode as variants — keeps the divergence loud), PascalCase
decode for every variant, CBOR Text-scalar PascalCase shape via
Value-inspection, distinct-Display + distinct-JSON sentinels,
DegradedModeState 5-field shape with None/Some(reason) optional
serialization (no skip_serializing_if), CBOR roundtrip with embedded
reason, HashMap key behavior.

11 tests green via CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-p1-wik35 cargo test -p
fcp-core --test selector_mode_variant_matrix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
